title: Spicy Thai Chicken Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry dish featuring chicken, vegetables, and Thai spices. Can be customized to suit your taste preferences.

ingredients.name: chicken
ingredients.amount: 1 pound boneless, skinless chicken breast or thighs

ingredients.name: xtra
ingredients.notes: such as peanut or canola oil

ingredients.name: prik
ingredients.amount: 2-3 Thai bird's eye chili peppers, sliced

ingredients.name: nam
ingredients.amount: 1 cup mixed vegetables (bell peppers, carrots, broccoli)

instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add chicken and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
3. Remove chicken from the skillet and set aside.
4. Add garlic and chili peppers to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
5. Add mixed vegetables and cook until tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
6. Return chicken to the skillet and stir in fish sauce and brown sugar.
7. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve hot over rice or noodles.
